---
id: get-the-bootstrap-data-for-sql-lab-page
title: "Get the bootstrap data for SqlLab page"
description: "Assembles SQLLab bootstrap data (active_tab, databases, queries, tab_state_ids) in a single endpoint. The data can be assembled from the current user's id."
sidebar_label: "Get the bootstrap data for SqlLab page"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: developer-docs/api/superset
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
show_extensions: true
---

import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get the bootstrap data for SqlLab page"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/sqllab/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>



Assembles SQLLab bootstrap data (active_tab, databases, queries, tab_state_ids) in a single endpoint. The data can be assembled from the current user's id.

<ParamsDetails>

</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./get-the-bootstrap-data-for-sql-lab-page.RequestSchema.json")}
>

</RequestSchema>
